name: tgp-finance
description: The Growth Project: Finance — Multi-tenant financial coaching and accountability app

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,mobile -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
scripts.migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:deploy: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
